underlying_goal: Build a custom, branded interactive timeline component with scroll effects for a landing page that can be pasted into a Divi Code module without plugins
friction_detail: Initial CSS positioning approach for timeline dots was incorrect, requiring multiple iterations to properly center the circles on the vertical line.
brief_summary: User wanted a custom branded timeline component for their landing page, and after several UI refinement iterations (centering dots, adjusting timeline start/end points, removing logo), they got exactly what they wanted.
